name: CITATION_FORMAT
prompt: Each citation in-text should be reference as [[{'doc_index': <<DOC INDEX POSITION ON RETRIEVED DOCUMENTS, 'section_name': <<SECTION_NAME>>, 'paper_id': <<PAPER ID>>]]

name: NAIVE_ALSE
prompt: Write an accurate, engaging, and concise answer for the given question using only the provided search results (some of which might be irrelevant) and cite them properly. Use an unbiased and journalistic tone. Always cite for any factual claim. When citing several search results, use <<[[CITATION_1]], [[CITATION_2]], [[CITATION_3]]>>. Cite at least one document and at most three documents for each content meaningful sentence. If multiple documents support the sentence, only cite a minimum sufficient subset of the documents.
